name: Beef Tajine with Prunes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet or tagine.
2. Add the butter and swirl to melt.
3. When the butter starts to foam, add the cubed beef to the pan.
4. Cook until all liquid has evaporated, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the chopped onions, minced garlic, grated ginger, saffron, cumin, salt, and pepper.
6. Cook until almost dry, stirring frequently.
7. Stir in 1/2 cup water (or as needed) and reduce heat to low.
8. Cover the pan and simmer for 2 hours, adding more water if necessary until the beef is tender.
9. Add the prunes and cook an additional 10 minutes.
10. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper.
11. Serve hot, sprinkled with sesame seeds. Traditionally served with couscous mixed with chickpeas.
